global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central app interface and clear call-to-action.
global.main_message: Order fresh meals quickly from nearby options.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A dark gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the other elements.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the word 'FreshDash' in a modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A representation of an app interface with two gray rectangles indicating food items, centered in the ad.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: A bold, white headline text that reads 'Dinner in minutes', centrally placed and easily readable.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline that says 'Fresh favorites nearby', providing additional context.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Order now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small decorative label indicating user-generated content, enhancing the ad's credibility.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold text, FreshDash logo, app interface, and call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the app interface in the center, with the headline and body text below, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: FreshDash, Dinner in minutes, Fresh favorites nearby, Order now, UGC
